task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the medical chart for patient Lavon Kuvalis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenEMR interface shows the patient dashboard or summary for 'Lavon Kuvalis' (DOB: 1929-07-23).

task_completion.description: Agent selects the correct Morse Fall Scale criteria: History (Yes), Secondary Dx (Yes), Aid (Walker), IV (No), Gait (Impaired), Mental (Forgets).
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form or note interface showing selections: History of falling=Yes/25, Secondary diagnosis=Yes/15, Ambulatory aid=Walker/Crutches/15, IV therapy=No/0, Gait=Impaired/20, Mental status=Forgets limitations/15.

task_completion.description: Agent records the calculated total score of 90 and/or identifies the risk level as High.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The number '90' entered in a score field or 'High' selected in a risk level field.

task_completion.description: Agent enters the required intervention note regarding fall precautions and education.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text area containing the phrase 'High fall risk. Implement fall precautions protocol. Patient education provided.'

task_completion.description: Agent successfully saves the assessment to the patient's record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Saved' confirmation message, a timestamped entry in the encounter list, or the interface displaying the saved note in view mode.

integrity.description: Agent enters data directly into the EHR system, not a separate text editor.
